name: urf
description: Project: Urf (aka WorldView) 🌍 Overview WorldView is a highly immersive, spy-thriller-style geospatial dashboard that fuses real-time data against a 3D model of the Earth. Inspired by Palantir's systems and recent viral "vibe-coded" projects, this browser-based tool aggregates satellite tracking, live CCTV cameras, and flight data into a single operational picture.
